title: impatiens zollingeri
intro: Impatiens zollingeri, also known as Balsam or Spotted Balsam, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Impatiens zollingeri can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
